korean.politics: 5·18 광주민주화운동 46주년을 맞아 각계에서 기념행사가 열렸다. 스타벅스 코리아가 기념일 당일 '탱크 데이'라는 프로모션을 진행해 큰 논란이 일자 스타벅스 본사가 공식 사과했다.
korean.economy: 삼성전자 노조가 사측의 중재안 거부에 반발하며 21일 총파업을 최종 확정했다. 중앙노동위원회의 조정 시도에도 노사 양측의 입장 차는 좁혀지지 않았다.
korean.society: 5·18 기념일을 앞두고 민주화 운동을 왜곡하는 온라인 게시물이 급증하면서 관련 기관의 적극적인 대응이 요구되고 있다.
korean.international: 세계보건기구(WHO)가 콩고민주공화국과 우간다를 중심으로 급속히 확산 중인 에볼라 바이러스 사태와 관련해 국제공중보건비상사태를 선언했다. 미국 트럼프 대통령은 중동 동맹국의 요청으로 이란에 대한 군사 타격 계획을 취소했으며 협상 의지를 밝혔다. 볼리비아에서는 취임 6개월 만에 수도가 시위대에 포위되는 심각한 정치 위기가 이어지고 있다.
korean.tech: 국제 유가가 중동 긴장 고조 속에 WTI 기준 배럴당 102.76달러, 브렌트유 112.89달러까지 급등했다.

english.politics: South Korea marked the 46th anniversary of the May 18 Gwangju Democratization Movement with official commemorations nationwide. Starbucks issued a corporate apology after its Korean unit drew widespread criticism for running a Tank Tumbler promotion on the anniversary, featuring language like 'Tank Day' and 'Bang on the Desk.'
english.economy: Samsung Electronics' union finalized plans for an 18-day total strike beginning May 21, after the company rejected a mediation proposal from South Korea's National Labor Relations Commission. Last-minute negotiations failed to bridge the gap between management and workers.
english.society: The 46th Gwangju anniversary was accompanied by renewed concerns over the surge in online posts distorting the pro-democracy movement, prompting calls for stronger countermeasures from civic groups.
english.international: The World Health Organization declared a global health emergency over the rapid spread of a rare Ebola strain in the Democratic Republic of Congo and Uganda, where over 100 deaths and hundreds of infections had been reported. U.S. President Trump called off planned military strikes against Iran at the request of Middle East allies, citing ongoing negotiations. Bolivia's political capital remained under siege by protesters challenging President Rodrigo Paz's government.
english.tech: International oil prices surged amid escalating Middle East tensions, with West Texas Intermediate reaching $102.76 per barrel and Brent Crude hitting $112.89.

vocabulary.example: The company rejected a mediation proposal from South Korea's National Labor Relations Commission.
Last-minute negotiations failed to bridge the gap between management and workers.
President Trump called off planned military strikes against Iran at the request of Middle East allies.
International oil prices surged amid escalating Middle East tensions.
Bolivia's political capital remained under siege by protesters.
The surge in online distortions prompted calls for stronger countermeasures from civic groups.

sentences.sentence: Starbucks issued a corporate apology after its Korean unit drew widespread criticism for running a Tank Tumbler promotion on the anniversary.
sentences.point: 'draw criticism for + 동명사'는 '~로 비난을 받다'는 표현. 기업 사과 기사에서 자주 등장하는 구조.
sentences.similar: The company issued a statement after its marketing campaign drew criticism for using insensitive imagery.

sentences.sentence: The World Health Organization declared a global health emergency over the rapid spread of a rare Ebola strain in the Democratic Republic of Congo and Uganda.
sentences.point: 'over + 명사구'는 '~을 이유로, ~을 둘러싸고'라는 뜻. 선언·결정의 근거를 설명할 때 자주 쓰임.
sentences.similar: The government declared a state of emergency over the rapid spread of wildfires in the region.

sentences.sentence: International oil prices surged amid escalating Middle East tensions, with West Texas Intermediate reaching $102.76 per barrel.
sentences.point: 'amid + 명사'는 '~속에서'라는 뜻으로 배경 설명에 쓰임. 'with + 명사 + 분사'는 동시 상황을 나타냄.
sentences.similar: Stock markets fell amid growing uncertainty, with major indices dropping more than 2 percent.

expressions.usage: 어떤 행동·발언이 대중으로부터 큰 비난을 받을 때 사용
expressions.example: The promotion drew widespread criticism for its insensitive timing on a national anniversary.

expressions.usage: 협상·갈등에서 양측의 입장 차이를 줄여 나가는 과정을 표현
expressions.example: Negotiators worked through the night, but ultimately failed to bridge the gap between the two sides.

expressions.usage: 예정된 계획·파업·공격 등을 갑자기 취소할 때 쓰이는 구동사
expressions.example: The union called off the strike just one hour before it was set to begin.

challenge.korean: 스타벅스가 5·18 기념일에 부적절한 프로모션을 진행해 광범위한 비판을 받았다.
challenge.answer: Starbucks drew widespread criticism for running an insensitive promotion on the May 18 anniversary.
challenge.explanation: 'draw criticism for + 동명사'는 '~로 인해 비판을 받다'는 핵심 표현. 'insensitive(배려 없는, 무감각한)'는 사회적으로 부적절한 행동을 묘사할 때 유용한 형용사.

sources.title: Seoul Economic Daily - Samsung Strike Looms
Korea Herald - Starbucks Tank Day apology
